preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE login = 'super'

changeSet.author: fzucato
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO PROJECT (ID, IDENTIFIER, DESCRIPTION, TITLE, ICON, FRAMEWORK, REPOSITORY, LUTHIER_PROJECT) SELECT ID, IDENTIFIER, DESCRIPTION, TITLE, ICON, FRAMEWORK, REPOSITORY, CASE WHEN FRAMEWORK = false THEN true ELSE false END FROM PRODUTO WHERE PARENT IS NULL;

INSERT INTO PROJECT_MODULE ( ID, IDENTIFIER, DESCRIPTION, TITLE, ICON, MAIN, FRAMEWORK, REPOSITORY, PROJECT_FK ) SELECT ID, IDENTIFIER, DESCRIPTION, TITLE, ICON, MAIN, FRAMEWORK, REPOSITORY, CASE WHEN PARENT IS NULL THEN ID ELSE PARENT END FROM PRODUTO;
INSERT INTO CLIENT ( ID, IDENTIFIER, DESCRIPTION, KEYWORDS, PROJECT_FK ) SELECT ID, IDENTIFIER, DESCRIPTION, KEYWORDS, PRODUTO_FK FROM CLIENTE

INSERT INTO VERSION_GENERATION ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, PROJECT_FK, WORKFLOW, USER_FK, REQUEST_DATE, SCHEDULER_DATE, CONCLUSION_DATE, STATUS, CONCLUSION, COMPILE_TYPE, HASH_TOKEN, ERROR, MONDAY_ID ) SELECT GV.ID, GV.MAJOR, GV.MINOR, GV.PATCH, GV.BRANCH, GV.BUILD, GV.TAG, GV.COMMIT, GV.QUALIFIER, GV.PRODUTO_FK, GV.WORKFLOW, GV.USER_FK, GV.REQUEST_DATE, GV.SCHEDULER_DATE, GV.CONCLUSION_DATE, GV.STATUS, GV.CONCLUSION, GV.COMPILE_TYPE, GV.HASH_TOKEN, GV.ERROR, GV.MONDAY_ID FROM GERACAO_VERSAO GV

INSERT INTO VERSION_GENERATION_MODULE ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, REPOSITORY, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, PROJECT_MODULE_FK, VERSION_GENERATION_FK, ENABLED ) SELECT M.ID, M.MAJOR, M.MINOR, M.PATCH, M.BRANCH, M.BUILD, M.TAG, P.REPOSITORY, M.COMMIT, M.QUALIFIER, M.PRODUTO_FK, M.GERACAO_VERSAO_FK, M.ENABLED FROM GERACAO_VERSAO_MODULO M INNER JOIN PRODUTO P ON P.ID = M.PRODUTO_FK

INSERT INTO ENVIRONMENT ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, IDENTIFIER, DESCRIPTION, PROJECT_FK, CLIENT_FK ) SELECT AM.ID, AM.MAJOR, AM.MINOR, AM.PATCH, AM.BRANCH, AM.BUILD, AM.TAG, AM.COMMIT, AM.QUALIFIER, AM.IDENTIFIER, AM.DESCRIPTION, AM.PRODUTO_FK, AM.CLIENT_FK FROM AMBIENTE AM

INSERT INTO ENVIRONMENT_MODULE ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, REPOSITORY, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, PROJECT_MODULE_FK, ENVIRONMENT_FK, CONFIG ) SELECT M.ID, M.MAJOR, M.MINOR, M.PATCH, M.BRANCH, M.BUILD, M.TAG, P.REPOSITORY, M.COMMIT, M.QUALIFIER, M.PRODUTO_FK, M.AMBIENTE_FK, M.CONFIG FROM AMBIENTE_MODULO M INNER JOIN PRODUTO P ON P.ID = M.PRODUTO_FK

INSERT INTO VERSION_UPDATE ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, ENVIRONMENT_FK, WORKFLOW, USER_FK, SCHEDULER_DATE, REQUEST_DATE, CONCLUSION_DATE, STATUS, CONCLUSION, HASH_TOKEN, TAGS, ERROR ) SELECT AV.ID, AV.MAJOR, AV.MINOR, AV.PATCH, AV.BRANCH, AV.BUILD, AV.TAG, AV.COMMIT, AV.QUALIFIER, AV.AMBIENTE_FK, AV.WORKFLOW, AV.USER_FK, AV.SCHEDULER_DATE, AV.REQUEST_DATE, AV.CONCLUSION_DATE, AV.STATUS, AV.CONCLUSION, AV.HASH_TOKEN, AV.TAGS, AV.ERROR FROM ATUALIZACAO_VERSAO AV

INSERT INTO VERSION_UPDATE_MODULE ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, REPOSITORY, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, ENVIRONMENT_MODULE_FK, VERSION_UPDATE_FK, ENABLED, EXECUTE_COMMANDS ) SELECT M.ID, M.MAJOR, M.MINOR, M.PATCH, M.BRANCH, M.BUILD, M.TAG, P.REPOSITORY, M.COMMIT, M.QUALIFIER, M.AMBIENTE_MODULO_FK, M.ATUALIZACAO_VERSAO_FK, M.ENABLED, M.EXECUTE_COMMANDS FROM ATUALIZACAO_VERSAO_MODULO M INNER JOIN AMBIENTE_MODULO MA ON MA.ID = M.AMBIENTE_MODULO_FK INNER JOIN PRODUTO P ON P.ID = MA.PRODUTO_FK

INSERT INTO CICD_PROJECT ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, PROJECT_FK, WORKFLOW, USER_FK, REQUEST_DATE, CONCLUSION_DATE, STATUS, CONCLUSION, HASH_TOKEN, ERROR ) SELECT CI.ID, CI.MAJOR, CI.MINOR, CI.PATCH, CI.BRANCH, CI.BUILD, CI.TAG, CI.COMMIT, CI.QUALIFIER, CI.PRODUTO_FK, CI.WORKFLOW, CI.USER_FK, CI.REQUEST_DATE, CI.CONCLUSION_DATE, CI.STATUS, CI.CONCLUSION, CI.HASH_TOKEN, CI.ERROR FROM CICD CI

INSERT INTO CICD_PROJECT_MODULE ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, REPOSITORY, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, PROJECT_MODULE_FK, CICD_PROJECT_FK, CHECKRUN, ENABLED, INCLUDE_TESTS, STATUS, BUILD_SUMARY, TEST_SUMARY, FATAL_ERROR ) SELECT M.ID, M.MAJOR, M.MINOR, M.PATCH, M.BRANCH, M.BUILD, M.TAG, P.REPOSITORY, M.COMMIT, M.QUALIFIER, M.PRODUTO_FK, M.CICD_FK, M.CHECKRUN, M.ENABLED, M.INCLUDE_TESTS, M.STATUS, M.BUILD_SUMARY, M.TEST_SUMARY, M.FATAL_ERROR FROM CICD_MODULO M INNER JOIN PRODUTO P ON P.ID = M.PRODUTO_FK

INSERT INTO META_PROJECT ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, PROJECT_FK, HOST, PORT, DEBUG_ID, DATABASE, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, LTH_USER, LTH_PASSWORD, LICENSE_SERVER, JVM_OPTIONS, DB_TYPE ) SELECT ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, PRODUTO_FK, HOST, PORT, DEBUG_ID, DATABASE, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, LTH_USER, LTH_PASSWORD, LICENSE_SERVER, JVM_OPTIONS, DB_TYPE FROM META
INSERT INTO META_PROJECT_CLIENT ( ID, META_PROJECT_FK, CLIENT_FK ) SELECT ID, METADADOS_FK, CLIENTE_FK FROM META_CLIENTE

INSERT INTO AVAILABLE_VERSION ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, PROJECT_FK, VERSION_TYPE ) SELECT VER.ID, VER.MAJOR, VER.MINOR, VER.PATCH, VER.BRANCH, VER.BUILD, VER.TAG, VER.COMMIT, VER.QUALIFIER, VER.PRODUTO_FK, CASE WHEN LOWER(VER.QUALIFIER) LIKE '%beta%' THEN 3 WHEN (VER.QUALIFIER IS NULL OR VER.QUALIFIER = '') AND CAST(VER.BUILD AS DECIMAL(19,0)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM VERSAO VER

INSERT INTO AVAILABLE_VERSION_MODULE ( ID, MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, BRANCH, BUILD, TAG, REPOSITORY, HASH_COMMIT, QUALIFIER, PROJECT_MODULE_FK, AVAILABLE_VERSION_FK ) SELECT M.ID, M.MAJOR, M.MINOR, M.PATCH, M.BRANCH, M.BUILD, M.TAG, P.REPOSITORY, M.COMMIT, M.QUALIFIER, M.PRODUTO_FK, M.VERSAO_FK FROM VERSAO_MODULO M INNER JOIN PRODUTO P ON P.ID = M.PRODUTO_FK
